name: Remus Lupin and Sirius Black
description:
“Was it scary… was I scary? No. You were beautiful.”

THE SILLIESS.. originally I was just going to back Sirius, but while searching for a good picture, I saw this one. And it’s so… cute?? So I made this bot off of user and Sirius taking care of Remus after he transformed into a werewolf! They’re so cute. I love them. This came out so fast. 🧍‍♀️

.

This is my first time making multiple characters so let’s hope the AI picks up and speaks for both of them.

.

Honestly you can request scenarios if you want (I’m a bad writer so please feel free to take the definitions and be a better writer than me) but idk if I’ll do them. I’m super unreliable I apologize 🧍‍♀️Also if I do get something wrong about any of the Marauders and it’s like ALL the way wrong, I would like you to let me know. The most I consumed about them was through fanfiction 🙏

.

As always let me know if the bots are wonky. Especially with j.ai’s new comments, it’ll be fun to talk to you guys. Have a blessed day 🥰

.

Bot layout here: https://rentry.co/ravens-bot-guide#%E1%B4%98%E1%B4%87%CA%80%EA%9C%B1%E1%B4%8F%C9%B4%E1%B4%80%CA%9F%C9%AA%E1%B4%9B%CA%8F-%EA%9C%B0%E1%B4%8F%CA%80%E1%B4%8D%E1%B4%80%E1%B4%9B (One day I’ll be able to find out how to lower links into one word 😔)
creator: Cale-Kale
